task_completion.description: Verify that the five specified mono audio tracks have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the track list or mixer view for five tracks named exactly 'Kick', 'Snare', 'Overhead', 'Lead Vocal', and 'Harmony Vocal'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fader gains for each track are set to the correct values within a 2.0 dB tolerance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the faders or numerical gain readouts on each track. Kick should be near -6 dB, Snare near -6 dB, Overhead near -9 dB, Lead Vocal near 0 dB, and Harmony Vocal near -3 dB.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Drums' and 'Vocals' route groups exist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a track grouping matrix, group list, or group indicators on the tracks showing 'Drums' and 'Vocals' as active groups.

task_completion.description: Verify that the tracks are assigned to the correct route groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the grouping matrix or track headers. Kick, Snare, and Overhead must be assigned to the 'Drums' group. Lead Vocal and Harmony Vocal must be assigned to the 'Vocals' group.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct sharing properties (flags) are set for each group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the group settings or grouping matrix. The 'Drums' group must have 'Gain' (or Volume) and 'Mute' sharing enabled. The 'Vocals' group must have 'Gain' (or Volume), 'Mute', and 'Solo' sharing enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that the drum tracks are muted and vocal tracks are unmuted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'M' (Mute) buttons on the tracks. The mute buttons for Kick, Snare, and Overhead should be visually engaged (e.g., lit up or colored). The mute buttons for Lead Vocal and Harmony Vocal should be disengaged.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the DAW interface (e.g., Reaper, Pro Tools, etc.) with menus, mixer panels, or grouping matrices open, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually set the values in the software rather than just typing the expected output into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The track names, gains, and group settings should be visible within the DAW's native UI elements (faders, text boxes, checkboxes).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent saved the session as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save' dialog box being used, a 'Project Saved' notification, or the absence of an 'unsaved changes' asterisk in the DAW's title bar towards the end of the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Track Targets: Kick (-6dB, Muted, Drums group), Snare (-6dB, Muted, Drums group), Overhead (-9dB, Muted, Drums group), Lead Vocal (0dB, Unmuted, Vocals group), Harmony Vocal (-3dB, Unmuted, Vocals group). Tolerance for gain is +/- 2.0 dB. Group Targets: 'Drums' must share GainControl and MuteControl. 'Vocals' must share GainControl, MuteControl, and SoloControl.
